title: APV Artwork Manifest
description: One manifest per artwork. The unit of provenance in Art Provenance Vault: identity (sha256), authorship claim, creation chain, license offer, watermark records, and chain linkage to the creator's previous manifest. Signed in canonical (sorted-key, compact) form.

manifest_version.description: Version of this manifest contract. Bump on any breaking schema change.

asset.description: The artwork being registered, identified by its exact bytes.

byte_size.description: Size of the asset in bytes at registration time.

filename.description: Original filename. Informational only — identity is the hash.

storage.description: Where the bytes can be retrieved. Git is NOT the asset store; these are content-addressed locations the manifest points at.

locator.description: Backend-specific locator (path, bucket key, CID, URL).

creator.description: The entity claiming authorship. A claim, made non-repudiable by the signature — not adjudicated by APV.

id.description: Stable creator identifier (handle, DID, or URI).

public_key_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the signing key (MVP+). Binds the manifest signature to a stable creator identity.

creation.description: How the work was made — the provenance core for AI-assisted art.

created_at.description: When the work was created (creator-asserted; ledger timestamps come from git/anchoring).

tools.description: Software and models involved, in order of use.

model_hash.description: Hash of model weights if known — pins the exact model.

prompts.description: Prompt provenance. Record cleartext OR a salted hash for trade-secret prompts (provable later, private now).

prompt_sha256.description: sha256(salt || prompt) when the prompt itself is withheld.

step.description: Position in a multi-step generation chain.

human_contribution.description: Creator's contemporaneous declaration of human authorship (selection, composition, retouching...). Legally significant; free text by design — APV records claims, it does not score them.

ai_training.description: Explicit permission signal for use of this work in AI training. Separate from the license string; maps to C2PA training-and-data-mining assertion.

parent_works.description: Works this one derives from (img2img sources, collage elements, fine-tune references). Forms the derivation DAG across manifests.

manifest_sha256.description: Hash of the parent's manifest, if the parent is APV-registered.

license.description: The license offer attached to this work. Signed with the manifest, making the offer non-repudiable and timestamped.

spdx.description: SPDX license expression. Custom commercial terms use LicenseRef- with the full terms document referenced below.

terms_sha256.description: sha256 of the full commercial terms document when spdx uses LicenseRef-. Content-addressed like assets.

terms_url.description: Where the terms document can be retrieved.

rights_statement.description: Human-readable summary of what is and is not permitted.

watermarks.description: Record of every invisible watermark embedded in distributed copies of this work. Declarative ledger entries; embedding happens in the Layer 5 pipeline.

payload_sha256.description: Hash of the embedded payload — proves later what was embedded without revealing it here.

key_id.description: Identifier of the embedding key (never the key itself).

recipient_id.description: Stage 4: the licensee this variant was issued to. Enables leak tracing.

variant_sha256.description: Hash of the watermarked variant file (differs from asset.sha256 by construction).

registered_at.description: UTC timestamp the manifest was generated. Ledger ordering comes from the git chain; trusted time from anchoring (v1).

chain.description: Intra-creator hash chain, independent of git, so linkage survives export out of the repository (IPFS, C2PA sidecar, court filing).

prev.description: sha256 of this creator's previous manifest in canonical form, or null for the first work in the chain.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical manifest with this field removed. Reserved in PoC; Ed25519 from MVP.
